headline: Edison International Faces New Wildfire Audits And Eaton Fire Uncertainty
summary: California lawmakers are advancing a measure to require independent audits of wildfire mitigation spending before utilities, including Edison International (NYSE:EIX), can recover additional costs. At the same time, investigations and litigation related to the Eaton Fire are ongoing and present potential material risks for Edison International. Edison International, the parent of Southern California Edison, is a major electric utility operator in a state where wildfire risk is a core...
